cssParts.description: each grid item wrapper (when using items array)
cssParts.name: item

slots.description: optional header content above the grid
slots.name: header

slots.description: content shown when no items are present
slots.name: empty

members.name: colsLg
members.description: Number of columns on wide screens (≥1024px)

members.name: colsMd
members.description: Number of columns on medium screens (≥768px)

members.name: colsSm
members.description: Number of columns on small screens (≥480px)

members.name: colsXs
members.description: Number of columns on very small screens

members.name: gap
members.description: Gap between grid items (can be overridden with --grid-gap)

members.name: items
members.description: Optional: supply data array instead of slotted items

members.name: cardAspect
members.description:
Aspect ratio for auto-generated cards when using .items
Examples: '1 / 1', '4 / 3', '16 / 9', '3 / 4'

attributes.name: cols-lg
attributes.description: Number of columns on wide screens (≥1024px)

attributes.name: cols-md
attributes.description: Number of columns on medium screens (≥768px)

attributes.name: cols-sm
attributes.description: Number of columns on small screens (≥480px)

attributes.name: cols-xs
attributes.description: Number of columns on very small screens

attributes.name: gap
attributes.description: Gap between grid items (can be overridden with --grid-gap)

attributes.name: card-aspect
attributes.description:
Aspect ratio for auto-generated cards when using .items
Examples: '1 / 1', '4 / 3', '16 / 9', '3 / 4'
